# Read the text file and print some diagnostic information
path = "/mnt/data/file-3sEf7ePmH2ayfUfQVmF5iB-Q048.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()

len(text)

# Find the quoted verse in the text by locating the quotes
text[:500]

# Find the first pair of double quotes
first_quote = text.find('"')
second_quote = text.find('"', first_quote+1)
first_quote, second_quote, text[first_quote:second_quote+1]

start = first_quote+1
end = second_quote
verse_sub = text[start:end]
start, end, verse_sub

# Find all double-quoted segments
indices = []
pos = 0
while True:
    i = text.find('"', pos)
    if i == -1:
        break
    j = text.find('"', i+1)
    if j == -1:
        break
    indices.append((i, j, text[i+1:j]))
    pos = j+1

len(indices), indices[:5]

poem_quote = indices[1]
poem_start = poem_quote[0]+1
poem_end = poem_quote[1]
poem_text = poem_quote[2]
poem_start, poem_end, poem_text

output.code: text.count('فإن أبي ووالده وعرضي * لعرض محمد منكم وقاء')

# Find all occurrences of the poem exact string
poem = 'فإن أبي ووالده وعرضي * لعرض محمد منكم وقاء'
positions = []
pos = 0
while True:
    idx = text.find(poem, pos)
    if idx == -1:
        break
    positions.append(idx)
    pos = idx + 1
positions

verse = 'إن الذين جاؤوا بالإفك عصبة منكم لا تحسبوه شرا لكم بل هو خير لكم لكل امرئ منهم ما اكتسب من الإثم والذى تولى كبره منهم له عذاب عظيم'
positions_v = []
pos = 0
while True:
    idx = text.find(verse, pos)
    if idx == -1:
        break
    positions_v.append(idx)
    pos = idx + 1
positions_v

poem = 'فإن أبي ووالده وعرضي * لعرض محمد منكم وقاء'
start2 = text.find(poem, 3457-1)
end2 = start2 + len(poem)
start2, end2, len(poem)

# Show text around the second poem occurrence to ensure correct extraction
start = 3456 - 40
end = 3498 + 40
text[start:end]

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":204,"span_end":333,"span_text":"إن الذين جاؤوا بالإفك عصبة منكم لا تحسبوه شرا لكم بل هو خير لكم لكل امرئ منهم ما اكتسب من الإثم والذى تولى كبره منهم له عذاب عظيم","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":true,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"النور","sura_number":24,"aya_number":11},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"إِنَّ الَّذِينَ جَاءُوا بِالْإِفْكِ عُصْبَةٌ مِنْكُمْ ۚ لَا تَحْسَبُوهُ شَرًّا لَكُمْ ۖ بَلْ هُوَ خَيْرٌ لَكُمْ ۚ لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مِنْهُمْ مَا اكْتَسَبَ مِنَ الْإِثْمِ ۚ وَالَّذِي تَوَلَّىٰ كِبْرَهُ مِنْهُمْ لَهُ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":775,"span_end":817,"span_text":"فإن أبي ووالده وعرضي * لعرض محمد منكم وقاء","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":true,"aya_reference":{  "sura_name": "", "sura_number": 0, "aya_number": 0 },"hadeeth_reference":{"collection_name":"Sahih al-Bukhari","book_number":64,"hadith_number":4141},"corrected_text":"فإن أبي ووالده وعرضي * لعرض محمد منكم وقاء","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":3456,"span_end":3498,"span_text":"فإن أبي ووالده وعرضي * لعرض محمد منكم وقاء","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":true,"aya_reference":{  "sura_name": "", "sura_number": 0, "aya_number": 0 },"hadeeth_reference":{"collection_name":"Sahih al-Bukhari","book_number":64,"hadith_number":4141},"corrected_text":"فإن أبي ووالده وعرضي * لعرض محمد منكم وقاء","completely_invalid":false}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
